profile.name: Mateus Marinho
profile.role: Flutter, Dart, TypeScript, Next.js, Laravel & Docker

about: I work with Flutter and Dart for cross-platform products while also using TypeScript, Next.js, Laravel, and Docker in day-to-day delivery.
Current work combines Flutter/Dart development with TypeScript/Next.js, Laravel, and Docker for deployment and production operations.
Bridging product thinking, mobile execution, and production delivery.
Current status: Flutter / Dart with TypeScript, Next.js, Laravel, and Docker.
